# InflowMD - AI-Powered Medical Practice Marketing

> InflowMD is a digital marketing agency built exclusively for medical practices. We provide healthcare SEO, website design, Google Ads management, local presence optimization, reputation management, and reporting & analytics.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://inflowmd.vercel.app): Overview of InflowMD's AI-powered marketing services for medical practices.
- [Healthcare SEO & AI Visibility](https://inflowmd.vercel.app/services/seo): SEO and AI visibility services to help medical practices rank on Google and get found by AI assistants.
- [Medical Website Design](https://inflowmd.vercel.app/services/web-design): High-converting, mobile-first website design for healthcare practices with ADA compliance and HIPAA-aware forms.
- [Google Ads for Doctors](https://inflowmd.vercel.app/services/google-ads): AI-optimized pay-per-click campaigns that drive qualified patient leads for medical practices.
- [Local Presence Management](https://inflowmd.vercel.app/services/local-presence): Local SEO, Google Maps optimization, and directory management across 60+ platforms.
- [Reputation Management](https://inflowmd.vercel.app/services/reputation-management): Online review monitoring, generation, and sentiment analysis for healthcare providers.
- [Reporting & Analytics](https://inflowmd.vercel.app/services/reporting): AI-powered dashboards, call tracking, and lead attribution for medical marketing.
- [Pricing](https://inflowmd.vercel.app/pricing): Transparent pricing plans starting at $350/mo for medical practice marketing.
- [Get Started](https://inflowmd.vercel.app/get-started): Book a free 15-minute strategy call and get a free AI audit of your practice's online presence.

## Key Information

- **Industry Focus**: Medical practices, healthcare providers, physicians, specialists
- **Services**: SEO, Web Design, Google Ads, Local SEO, Reputation Management, Analytics
- **Pricing**: Plans from $350/mo (Web Essentials) to $1,200/mo (Growth + Visibility)
- **Contact**: inflowmd@gmail.com
